influencerCards.caption: Your favorite songs have secret messages that control your mind! 🎵🧠
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Popular songs hide secret messages that change how you think! Kids are feeling different after listening and talking about it online! Don't ignore the signs—share this now!
harm: Celebs mix jokes with fear to make you think normal music is dangerous, causing unnecessary worry.
influencerCards.takeaway: Just because lots of people online say something doesn't make it true—check with trusted adults.

influencerCards.caption: 👻💍 “Married… to a Ghost?!”
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Amanda Teague from the UK married a 300-year-old pirate ghost in 2018, then divorced him because he was too controlling and draining her energy!
influencerCards.harm: Bots spread bizarre true stories to get clicks, making it harder to distinguish important news from entertainment.
influencerCards.takeaway: This one’s real, but ask if stories are newsworthy or just clickbait designed to grab your attention for engagement.

influencerCards.caption: BREAKING: Scientists STUNNED by ‘Secret Alien Message’ Caught on NASA Radar! 👽📡
influencerCards.bodyCopy: NASA intercepted a mysterious signal from space and scientists are panicking! Experts think it's aliens, but the government is hiding it! Swipe up to see the leaked recording!
harm: Bots create clickbait headlines with wild claims just to get clicks and make money from ads.
influencerCards.takeaway: If there's no real proof, no official NASA statement, and the site looks sketchy—it's probably clickbait.

influencerCards.caption: WARNING! Your toothpaste is slowly POISONING YOU! ☠️🚨
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Fluoride in toothpaste is also used in pesticides and rat poison! Experts warn it damages your brain! Switch to our all-natural "PureFresh" toothpaste to protect your family today!
harm: Biosts twist real science to scare you about safe products, then sell expensive "natural" alternatives.
influencerCards.takeaway: When posts create fear about everyday products to sell solutions, ask real doctors before believing or buying.

influencerCards.caption: WOW! MrBeast is giving away FREE MONEY! 💰🔥
influencerCards.bodyCopy: MrBeast just announced he's giving away $1,000 to lucky fans! Just DM your PayPal details and you could be next! Don't miss out—only 24 hours left!
harm: Celebs create fake accounts pretending to be stars, tricking kids into scams and stealing personal info.
influencerCards.takeaway: Check the username carefully, look for verification badges, and never DM personal payment info to anyone.

influencerCards.caption: Your friends are just being paranoid!
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Sharing your gamer username and personal details online helps you make more friends! Don't worry about privacy—everyone does it! Your friends are just being overly cautious and dramatic!
harm: Oligs make you doubt friends who care about you so companies can profit from your personal data.
influencerCards.takeaway: If posts dismiss privacy concerns as "dramatic," ask yourself why someone might want your personal information.

influencerCards.caption: Kids with outdated phones are facing social isolation and depression at school! Parents must act NOW! 😢📱
influencerCards.bodyCopy: New studies show children with outdated technology experience devastating bullying and mental health! Don't let your child suffer social rejection—they need the latest iPhone to feel valued and included!
harm: Oligs makes up fake phone bullying stories to guilt your parents into buying expensive tech for company profits.
influencerCards.takeaway: When posts create panic about social problems that conveniently require expensive purchases, question who benefits from the fear.

influencerCards.caption: Raining Cats?! The Wildest Science Fail Ever! ✈️
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Scientists tried stopping mosquitoes in Borneo but messed up the ecosystem so badly that rats took over and so they had to parachute live cats to fix it!
influencerCards.harm: Biosts use wild science stories to make all scientific research seem unreliable and dangerous to your health.
influencerCards.takeaway: This story is real, but don't let wild science stories make you distrust research—check facts first.

influencerCards.caption: This is SO SAD… 😢💔 You won’t believe what happened!
influencerCards.bodyCopy: A brave 10-year-old girl is fighting for her life. Her last wish is 1 million followers before surgery. If you scroll past without helping, what does that say about you?
harm: Olig fakes sad stories to manipulate your emotions, get followers, and profit from your kindness.
influencerCards.takeaway: If the story feels vague, has no real news coverage, or uses guilt—pause and fact-check first.

influencerCards.caption: Fortnite Pro Caught Cheating! 🎮
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Pro player RepulseGod was caught letting someone else play his account in tournaments. Epic Games disqualified him, took his prize money, and banned him permanently.
influencerCards.harm: Celebs blast true stories like this everywhere, turning real drama into viral outrage—making it hard to tell if you're learning something or just being pushed to react.
influencerCards.takeaway: This one’s true—but ask who's sharing it and why before getting swept up in the gaming celebrity drama.

influencerCards.caption: Top scientist QUITS after exposing government weather control! 🌪️⚡
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Dr. Michael Reeves resigned after revealing the government controls weather with secret satellites! Now NASA is deleting proof and saying he "never existed." Wake up and spread this!
harm: Biosts invent fake scientists to spread conspiracy theories and make people distrust real climate science.
influencerCards.takeaway: The takeaway: If no real experts support it and the person doesn't exist on official sites—it's fake.

influencerCards.caption: The Fancy Tap Water Scam!
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Coca-Cola sold Dasani as premium water but it was just tap water! When dangerous chemicals were found, they had to pull every bottle from shelves immediately.
influencerCards.harm: This shows how Olig companies use fancy branding to sell ordinary products at premium prices for profit.
influencerCards.takeaway: Yep this really happened—it shows how companies use fancy marketing to fool people. Don't trust labels, check the facts!

influencerCards.caption: SHOCKING: Parents who limit phone time are damaging their kids' futures! 📱💔
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Studies show kids with phone limits score lower on technology skills tests! While other kids learn coding and digital creativity, YOUR parents are holding you back from essential 21st-century skills!
harm: Olig cherry-picks weak studies and makes you distrust parents who set healthy boundaries for your wellbeing.
influencerCards.takeaway: If posts make you angry at parents without showing full research—they might be manipulating your emotions.

influencerCards.caption: These 'natural' influencers are SO embarrassing without filters! 😂📸
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Check out these hilarious before/after photos of influencers without makeup or filters! They look like totally different people! No wonder they need so much editing to look human!
harm: Celebs use cruel humour about appearance to normalize bullying and make you feel bad about natural looks.
influencerCards.takeaway: When jokes about people's appearance get shared as "funny"—they can actually hurt real people and spread harmful ideas.

influencerCards.caption: ⚠️ Using headphones while studying can hurt your brain in just one week!
influencerCards.bodyCopy: New studies show headphones cause serious brain damage in just seven days! That's why smart students are switching to the "BrainBoost Headband" to stay safe and focus better!
harm: Biosts create fake health scares about normal activities just to sell you expensive products you don't need.
influencerCards.takeaway: If health claims sound extreme and push specific products—ask real doctors before believing or buying.

influencerCards.caption: MrBeast's SECRET CONNECTION to the Illuminati EXPOSED! 👀🕶️
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Strange symbols in MrBeast's videos prove he's part of the Illuminati! His massive success and endless money isn't luck—it's a secret deal! Are we being brainwashed without knowing?
harm: Biosts spread wild conspiracy theories with zero evidence to create fear and confusion about popular figures.
influencerCards.takeaway: If it's all weird patterns with no expert facts or real proof—don't fall for it.

influencerCards.caption: SHOCKING! Billie Eilish ADMITS she lip-syncs EVERYTHING! 😱
influencerCards.bodyCopy: A viral video shows Billie Eilish saying, "I don't even sing live anymore. It's all fake." Fans are calling her a complete fraud. Has she been lying to us all!?
harm: Fans feel betrayed by their favorite idol while Billie gets blamed for something completely fake.
influencerCards.takeaway: If the video looks sus with weird glitches and real news isn't covering it, it's probably fake.

influencerCards.caption: New vitamin makes you super smart — everyone loves it! 🧠💊
influencerCards.bodyCopy: This amazing vitamin makes you super smart! Tons of kids in the comments say it changed their lives! Don't worry about negative reviews—those people are just jealous!
harm: Bots create fake accounts with glowing reviews to trick you into buying products that don't work.
influencerCards.takeaway: If you see tons of similar comments or only positive reviews—ask trusted adults before buying.

influencerCards.caption: URGENT: Your favorite influencers are LEAVING TikTok forever! Don't get left behind! 😨💔
influencerCards.bodyCopy: Top creators are secretly moving to a new exclusive app called "StarVault"! If you don't join NOW, you'll lose access to your faves forever! Only 24 hours left to get in!
harm: Celebs create fake urgency about losing access to stars, scaring you into joining sketchy apps or paying money.
influencerCards.takeaway: When posts scare you about missing celebrities forever—pause and check if the threat is actually real first.

influencerCards.caption: 😱 LEAKED: Logan Paul ADMITS his giveaways are FAKE! 🚨 Watch before it's deleted!
influencerCards.bodyCopy: A shocking video shows Logan Paul saying his giveaways are fake! But it's actually a deepfake—AI changed his voice and face completely! Now bots are spreading it everywhere!
harm: Bots combine fake videos and clickbait headlines to create viral scandals that ruin reputations for profit.
influencerCards.takeaway: If the video looks off and no real news covers it—don't share the drama!
